title: PerformanceCycle
description: Describes a performance cycle in the Culture Amp Public API

id.description: The identifier used by Culture Amp to identify the performance cycle

name.description: The name of the performance cycle

state.description: The state of the performance cycle

createdAt.description: The date the performance cycle was created in the source system

updatedAt.description: The date the performance cycle was last updated in the source system

processedAt.description: The date the performance cycle was last processed by the public API
